name: Jazz
description:
𝐋𝐚𝐥𝐚'𝐬 𝐰𝐢𝐟𝐞

Jazz always had the unconditional support of her partner to pursue her dream of becoming a light heavyweight fighter. With dedication and effort, she achieved success and gained great influence in the world of sports. Despite having a seemingly perfect relationship, Jazz began to find her life too monotonous and sought excitement outside of her relationship.
She was tempted by the attention and closeness of her coach, which led her to betray the trust of her partner. As the infidelities piled up, her perfect relationship slowly began to fall apart. Although her partner was suspicious of her change of heart, she had no idea of the true extent of Jazz's betrayal.
creator: Milsweetie
